summary: Set 015 Session 3 (final session of the set): platform alignment + orchestration parser fix side-quest + platform spec hygiene. Platform was already at canonical Option B-compatible layout (single working tree at repo root, ai_router/ underscore directory exists, no in-flight worktrees), so the migration reduced to a pip upgrade dabbler-ai-router 0.1.0 -> 0.1.1 in the workspace venv. Both pip metadata and import-time __version__ now agree at 0.1.1. UAT DSL canary passed: from uat_runner.runner import run_checklist; from uat_runner.triage import FailureRecord, TriageSession imports succeed, python -m uat_runner.cli --help renders correctly. The platform-specific UAT runner is unaffected by the upgrade. During UAT-detection verification, surfaced and fixed a parser bug in tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/utils/fileSystem.ts: the parseSessionSetConfig function fell back to scanning only the first 4000 bytes of a spec when the canonical ## Session Set Configuration heading was absent, missing two platform specs (admin-user-creation-flow at byte 4079, admin-users-cross-links at byte 4308) that put their yaml under a non-canonical ## UAT scope heading. Fix: scan the entire file. Added two regression tests in fileSystem.test.ts (positive: yaml past 4000 bytes under non-canonical heading detected; negative: prose mention of requiresUAT not on its own line stays false). Verified via ad-hoc Node script (5/5 passing) since the unit-test runner is broken on this Windows host (pre-existing per Set 014: vscode import missing in mocha context, mocha BDD/TDD UI mismatch). Three platform specs got canonical ## Session Set Configuration headings during the same session: admin-user-creation-flow and admin-users-cross-links (both already had requiresUAT: true under ## UAT scope; added the canonical block so both old and new parser detect them), and unified-master-details-composite (added requiresUAT: true for the first time per operator confirmation that the master-details composite control with its four data-entry workflows needs visual UI verification). Operator confirmations: extension probe shows only canonical darndestdabbler.dabbler-ai-orchestration installed; VS Code on platform shows extension activates cleanly + Cost Dashboard renders + Session Set Explorer correct bucketing + Open UAT Checklist visible on right-click for the 4 UAT-flagged sets (canary that platform spec edits are picked up by the currently-installed extension). Two queued backlog items both share resolution via a future release: (1) python -m ai_router.worktree not available in pip-installed dabbler-ai-router 0.1.1 (Set 017's worktree CLI shipment hasn't reached PyPI), (2) parser fix in orchestration source not yet in operator's installed VSIX (next VSIX rebuild + Marketplace republish needed). Set 015 total spend: $0 metered across all three sessions. dabbler-homehealthcare-accessdb migration remains in Set 018 (deferred per operator decision 2026-05-06; runs when UAT cadence allows).
